issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a trigger matching 'when a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck', not 'Activated'. This is a state-change trigger, not an activation.
Missing duration. Text '[Your Turn]' requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn.
Missing condition for '[Once Per Turn]' frequency limitation.

Trigger mechanism is undefined in current DSL. The card effect describes a specific condition ('when a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck') that does not map cleanly to standard triggers. This requires clarification of whether a custom trigger or composite condition is needed.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, draw 1 card.
